Outbound follow-up call regarding Hydro 1620 hydraulic heat press machine. Customer inquired about noise levels, requested videos of machine in operation, confirmed product is in stock with 7-10 day shipping to California. Customer interested in 10% discount pricing ($3,149). Agent provided social media links for additional videos and encouraged customer to reach out with further questions. Call ended positively with customer satisfied.
